hero.name: Hadas Hinkis
hero.title: Media Creator
hero.subtitle: Art director, video creator, AI visuals, video and audio editing

about.title: About
about.text: Hi! I’m a multidisciplinary creative, with a passion for color and aesthetics and a love for good storytelling. Obsessed with social media, I understand the impact video and audio have on creating social change. I want to create media that is pleasant and engaging, while adding value and making an impact.
